title: Long-Term Effectiveness and Safety of Isatuximab in Combination with Pomalidomide and Dexamethasone in a Japanese Patient with Refractory Multiple Myeloma and 1q21 Amplification: A Case Report.
abstract: In the ICARIA-MM trial, isatuximab plus pomalidomide-dexamethasone (Pd) significantly prolonged progression-free survival, compared with Pd alone, in patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma (RRMM), including those with gain or amplification of chromosome 1q, region 2, band 1 (1q21+).
